source_text: “Di ki patóngkóé tingód kanan.”
target_text: “Let us not talk about that.”

source_text: Tô batà buringán
target_text: The unkempt child

source_text: Dakál kasili, su igkita a katô igukit i Malingling tô migliyu tut Subuwan.
target_text: He was a big eel, because I saw where Malingling passed through when he went around Subuwan.

source_text: Pero áknganni, tô áglumun katô mga manubù, atin tô balé ágkamatayan, atin áglábbángngán dan dán tô minaté, tô langun katô umpak din, umpak katô minaté ó langun katô impán din, ágpapiddán dan tô langun abô ándà dán ágkitanán dan isamà dutut balé dan.
target_text: But now, what people do is, if it is the household that has been bereaved, when they bury the deceased, all of his clothing, the clothing of the deceased or all of his belongings, they have all of the belongings taken away so that they will see nothing remaining in their house.

source_text: Na, sikuna pagsik mama, yan é lumu nu, tô nángngà makabággék dayó katô duma nu.
target_text: Now, you man, the thing you are to do, it is to adequately give joy to your spouse.

source_text: Na, igtakkó, migdunggù si Datù Masaglang, tò pangulu ka ágtimbalayu.
target_text: Then suddenly, Datu Masaglang, the leader of the sorcerers, arrived.

source_text: Igbággean áskandin ka marapung agung.
target_text: He was given many brass gongs.

source_text: Gudalì mipilé dán tô kayu, migkita dan tô inggó na batu na mikasuksuk tun át kayu.
target_text: When the tree fell over, they found what was like a stone that had become wedged in the tree.

source_text: Igkan ka kudà.
target_text: A horse ate it.

source_text: Atin siyó dán bulan, ágbawian din abô dì ágkatággasan ka ágpamasusu dán.
target_text: After nine months, the midwife treats the woman with herbal medicine so that she will not suffer hardship when she gives birth.

source_text: Ni dád ni ágkannán, ni dadan ta bókkóg katô kasili.
target_text: This part that was being eaten, it was here toward the back of the eel.

source_text: Kakalyag ku ni dád gó álló gó ni pasadunán kannun.
target_text: My desire this very day is to have him come here.

source_text: Migdunggù tô sábbad manubù diyan, si Gregorio Ambat.
target_text: A certain person arrived there, Gregorio Ambat.

source_text: Atin kun tô manubù ágsabállón, ágkasakitak ulu, asta pakénótà na ágkabalóyón.
target_text: As for the one who suffers negative consequences, his head will ache, and he will vomit and feel dizzy.

source_text: Migbunal din ka kaludà é ulu.
target_text: She beat them on the head with a ladle.

source_text: Ándà kadugé, tô bayi, migbáttu tô ininám.
target_text: Not long after that, the woman, her bag of water burst.

source_text: Na ándasu duwán dán apuy dan, ándà dán sunnud kadugé migmappawà dán.
target_text: Then when they already had their fires, it was not very long when it now became bright.

source_text: Igpapid i Basagan ki Paliman gulì dutun ta Bassa.
target_text: Basagan sent him home with Paliman to Bassa.

source_text: Su kagi man ka Tagabawà, tô karkulu ku, Tagabawà.
target_text: For naturally it is the speech of the Tagabawas; in my estimation, it is Tagabawa.

source_text: Igsugbanan i Lumabát.
target_text: Lumabat ceased.

source_text: Ágkabulbulan dán.
target_text: He then became feathered.

source_text: Na ándasu pángnga din ágtampád, gággát din ágbagkás ka sinulid abô dì ágdipanug.
target_text: And when she finishes cutting it (the cord), she tightly closes it tying it with thread so it will not bleed.

source_text: Na, Datù, ni dán baluran ka lima agung, igpid kud nit saruwan nu.
target_text: Now then, Datu, this gong valued at five hundred pesos, I have now brought it here before you.

source_text: Migdaddasan ku katô bawì ku na lana para ka panuhut.
target_text: I rubbed her with my herbal medicine that was coconut oil used for chills.

source_text: Ándasu dutun tógpuk dalan, tákkó tô kayu dalumé, miginsà kandin, “Mándak saru, tô batà buringán malandág é kiré?”
target_text: When he was further along the path, suddenly the dalumé tree, it asked him, “Where are you going, unkempt child with the slick eyebrows?”

source_text: Duwán mibaluy mangguwapuy.
target_text: Some were transformed into pitta birds.

source_text: Bahalà kad kani, na patawar nud si Alfredo Lambac, su dini dán ta áknikó balé ni agung.
target_text: You are now responsible for this, and you must now summon Alfredo Lambac, because this gong is now here at your house.

source_text: Bággé kók pagrispitu dutun ta agad sadan manubù.
target_text: Give respect to everyone regardless of who they are.

source_text: Kannun dán gó.
target_text: He is indeed already here.

source_text: Na mà kun katô dadang su ágkédwan dán é dadang ák manubù ándà dán, ágkapánnas dán; áglámáddán dán i Malingling.
target_text: That is what the shrimp said because the shrimp now felt pity for the people who had already disappeared.

source_text: Atin duwán ágdinágán yu manuk ágkagi, “Kulagu,” ás Warì yan; miguli dutun banuwa su mikakitak malutù saging.
target_text: If you hear a bird saying, “Kulagu,” that is Wari; he returned to the earth because he saw ripe bananas.

source_text: Labé dán tô asu ágbaringkurung tut sunu katô góddán.
target_text: The dog just proceeded to curl up in the corner of the home.

source_text: Mister Alfredo Lambac, tô agung balur ák lima, kannun dát balé.
target_text: Mr. Alfredo Lambac, that gong valued at five hundred, it is now here at the house.

source_text: Misókó si Sandawà.
target_text: Sandawa was angry.

source_text: Na, igkagi si Basagan, “Ágsággò ké asta ágranu ké, su yan batà ku, ágpangalalan dán.”
target_text: Now Basagan said, “We are crying, and we are sad, because as for that daughter of mine, she is now experiencing labor pains.”

source_text: Na madigár ahà nu ka nángngà dutun ta ginawa nu tô agung.
target_text: And it would be good for you to examine whether the gong is enough to your liking.

source_text: Na, madigár sállám, Datù.
target_text: Now good morning, Datu.

source_text: Pero ándà pa sikandan minaté, migpanalanan dan, mà dan, “Tampád nu ni ikug ku, na pamula nu tun ta tanà.”
target_text: But before they died, they instructed him, saying, “Cut off this tail of mine, and plant it in the ground.”

source_text: Yan ágpamuyuán ku diyan ákniyu, tô gabatà yu, péskuwila yu, abô dutun ta tapuli álló, na mému áskandan na sábbad pagsik mid kani kóddô.
target_text: What I am asking of you is, your children, have them attend school, so that at some future time, it may be possible that one of them also will lead this community.

source_text: Migtuman katô batà.
target_text: The child fulfilled.

source_text: Na, sábbad álló, igkagi i Basagan, mà din, “Mga manubù, palimudé kó langun su mimu ki ka ináman.”
target_text: Now one day, Basagan spoke, saying, “People, all of you gather together because we will make a feast.”

source_text: Lumu kó katô nángngà makabággé ákniyu ka kadigállan dutun ta ákniyu kóddô.
target_text: Do what will adequately give you what will be a benefit to your lives.

source_text: Na tô gó kali ulì si Paliman dutun ta banuwa din Bassa katig dán tô sawa i Basagan gawat.
target_text: And that is why Paliman did not go home to his place at Bassa until Basagan’s wife was skilled at being a midwife.

source_text: Na, igsumar katô tábbé din tô asu dut pagampak, mà din kun, “Igánda dán si Paladayán?”
target_text: Now his sister met the dog at the entrance, she said, “Where is Paladayan now?”

source_text: Tò gó tò una ikatabang kandin, su tò saladáng asta mga babuy ák mabánás igpidán katò banug na pagsunggud din katò kandin pispis, tò gó tò ágkannán din róggun tun dalám áskandin gállás.
target_text: That is what first helped him, because the deer and the wild pigs that the eagle brought as provisions for its own chicks, that is what he ate while he was hiding inside.

source_text: Tô gó ágkéduwan din tô gabatá din milapa ka báttám, ibaluy lutung.
target_text: That is why she pities her children burned by millet, transformed into monkeys.

source_text: Ilusán áskandin su abô ágkólì tô mga bákkár din, abô ágkólì tô lawa din, su iring na mibugtus tô mga ugat din.
target_text: She will be massaged so that her strength will recover, so that her body will recover, for it is as if her tendons have been severed.

source_text: Tò gó igplanu tò apù ku bayi, na mabalyan, na sungtán ka ménit abu su abò ágkamaté.
target_text: That is why my grandmother, who was a midwife, planned to put hot ashes in his mouth so that he would die from it.

source_text: Mà din kun, “Ulit kad migánda dán Paladayán,” mà katô bayi.
target_text: She said, “You tell me where Paladayan is now,” said the woman.

source_text: Su atin pabutángngé yan asu, na sugbanan dé sikuna.
target_text: Because if those dogs fight each other, then we will cease doing it for you.

source_text: Agad áknganni dinágán nu tô puné ágkagi, mà din, “Mm, mm, batà ku, milapa ka báttám.”
target_text: Even nowadays you can hear the green pigeon speaking, saying, “Mm, mm, my child, was burned by millet.”

source_text: Tagpiraé dád é dalaga, su atin ka ágpanmasusu tô bayi, ágbubúan tô gátták (asta) ágkangén tô malambù tun dalám katô mabataan.
target_text: There were only a few maidens, because whenever a woman gave birth, her abdomen was cut open, and the fat was taken from inside the womb.

source_text: Tô gó tô igsadun a dini áknikó su pabayadan ku tô.
target_text: That is why I have come here to you because I will require payment for it.

source_text: Lumu kók madigál.
target_text: Do what is good.

source_text: Ás Malingling
target_text: Malingling

source_text: Mikurágging áskandin!
target_text: She screamed!

source_text: Sábbad álló, misókó tô bulan katô álló su idugé ándà ulì.v
target_text: One day, the moon was angry at the sun because he did not return home for a long time.

source_text: Tô é lumu yu, tô nángngà makabággé ka dayó tun ta pusung katô duma nu.
target_text: What you are to do, it is what can adequately give joy to the heart of your spouse.

source_text: Sapulù lima ámmé a dád pa, midinágán ku tô gulitán katô innà ku.
target_text: I was only fifteen years old, I happened to hear my mother’s story.

source_text: Mikakita katô batà, na migsingyasan dan tô batà, ágpasanudán dutut madani dan.
target_text: They saw the child, and they gestured to the child, having him go near to them.

source_text: Na, ándin é kuwa nu, su madani man dán é tarusuban ka Subuwan.
target_text: Now what do you know, because the Subuwan waterfall was now very near.

source_text: Tô gabatá tô, ibaluy lutung.
target_text: As for those children, they were transformed into monkeys.
